title: 10 best herbal teas for chronic hepatitis
description: Galium aparine, also known as cleavers, teas helps with chronic hepatitis because it contains bioactive compounds that possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, help to reduce liver inflammation and oxidative stress, which are common underlying factors in chronic hepatitis.
